contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Credential page: tap-to-expand practice session details
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/128
  
  Details:
  Operator pain: on https://truesight.me/programs/tribomirim/credentials/#<slug>, individual session rows under 'Recent events' were single-line summaries (date + practice-type + source) — no way to see what was actually practiced in each session.
  
  Diagnosed: the cache (built by lineage-engine) already carried the full payload submitted by capoeira/assets/js/practice-event-submit.js — theme, moves_practiced (Portuguese name + duration_seconds per move), music_played, total_practice_minutes — but the credential renderer (program-shell.js) ignored ev.payload entirely and only used captured_at + practice_type + source_url. Pure display-layer gap.
  
  Shipped: when an event row carries a payload block, the row becomes a <details> with:
  - Summary line: date + practice-type + theme pill + total minutes
  - Expanded body: moves practiced (name + minutes), music played (when populated), and the source link
  
  Events without a payload (legacy or non-practice event types) fall back to the original single-line layout — no regression. Uses native <details>/<summary> for accessibility and zero-JS expand/collapse.
  
  CSS added to both program credential pages (tribomirim + butterfly-effect) since they share the program-shell.js renderer but each carries its own scoped styles.
  
  Flagged as out-of-scope for the follow-up backlog: some move names render as 'Cocorinha com rol?' instead of 'Cocorinha com rolê' — UTF-8 encoding hiccup at submission time. The display layer surfaces whatever the cache has; the source bug is separate.
  
  Promotion to prod: cherry-picked 5c3c082 onto truesight_me_prod main as 8cbfa59 — NOT 'gh repo sync --force' (CNAME footgun avoidance, per the 2026-05-19 incident). Cherry-pick touches only js/program-shell.js + the two program credential pages. CNAME and the protect-cname guardrail workflow stayed put. Verified post-push: prod's CNAME still reads 'truesight.me'.
  
  PR: TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta#128 (squash-merged 5c3c082); prod promotion via cherry-pick 8cbfa59.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
